_comment: Diagnostic: aligned train-only goal pool (49 episodes; val 6048 excluded). At runtime, each online episode's goal is the libero_wm demo whose t=0 proprio is closest to the LIBERO init_state used. (online start, goal end) thus come from approximately the same trajectory — matching training. NOTE: goal frames are still from training set, so success rate here is a leakage upper bound, not a fair number.

records.task: KITCHEN_SCENE10: put the butter at the back in the top drawer of the cabinet and close it
